headline: Smurfit Westrock Is Worthy Of Attention - My Favorite Long-Term Pick Right Now
summary: Smurfit Westrock (SW) trades at a steep discount with a 4.5% yield as margins target PKG-like levels; explore the value case and upside now.

headline: Smurfit Westrock Set to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in Store?
summary: SW heads into Q1 results, with falling EPS estimates and mixed demand trends, as stable packaging needs and e-commerce gains face European volume weakness.

headline: PepsiCo, Givaudan, Smurfit Westrock and Statkraft Sign 10‑Year Renewable Energy Agreement to Advance Value Chain Decarbonization Across Europe
summary: PepsiCo (NASDAQ: PEP), Givaudan, Smurfit WestRock and Statkraft have announced a 10‑year Virtual Power Purchase Agreement (VPPA) with an underlying wind asset in Spain which is undergoing repowering. The agreement strengthens progress toward shared sustainability goals

headline: PepsiCo, Givaudan, Statkraft, And Smurtfit Westrock Sign 10-Year Virtual Power Purchase Agreement To Reduce Emissions Across Europe
summary: The renewable electricity generated through this agreement is expected to contribute to an estimated 32,000 metric tons of CO₂ emissions reductions per year.
